notes: The presentation poster is mandatory but its internal narrative is not exposed as separate portal text fields.

routes.label: Student concept
routes.applies_when: A current student or eligible recent graduate submits a qualifying concept.

fields.label: Entry name
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the official concept name consistently.

fields.label: Category
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the current official category label after live verification.

fields.label: Design statement
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain the problem, concept, primary user benefit, and why the proposal matters in concise English.

fields.label: Student or team member name
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the applicant name exactly as it should appear in credits.

fields.label: Additional team members
fields.drafting_instructions: List additional eligible team members in the intended credit order.

fields.label: University
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the university's official English name.
